subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-'Abidin! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the Most Merciful, from this mighty Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا زین العابدین ان استمع ندآء ربک الرحیم من شطر هذا السجن العظیم الملک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
